scope: language constructs used during WordPress bootstrap
target_gates: PHPT_REUSE_LAST=0 PHPT_DEV_REUSE_TARGET_PASS=0 nix develop -c just phpt-dev-module MODULE=wp.core-language
next_step: Keep wp.core-language green while additional WordPress install-time blockers are handled by their owning runtime, standard-library, database, or server areas.
